name: Daily Kickoff
description: Manually trigger your morning kickoff SOP. Click the play button to start your daily briefing — it will check emails, tickets, calendar, health events, and generate your priority list.

then.prompt: Run the Daily Kickoff SOP. Read the SOP from sops/daily-kickoff.md and execute each step using available MCP tools (Outlook for emails, SIM/support for tickets, calendar for meetings). Generate a daily briefing and save it to customers/_daily-briefings/ with today's date. If any MCP servers are not available, skip that step and note it in the output.
